join_order.probe: num(uom = 'pure' AND value IS NOT NULL)
join_order.notes: Materialize fy2022-only adsh->sub_rowid direct lookup from sub_fy_postings and sub.adsh; probe before reading tag/value for rejected rows.

join_order.build: max_map((adsh, tag) -> max_value) over semijoin-qualified pure num rows
join_order.probe: num(uom = 'pure' AND value IS NOT NULL AND adsh IN fy2022)
join_order.notes: Two-pass plan: pass 1 computes MAX(value) per packed (adsh,tag); pass 2 keeps rows where value equals max_map[key].

data_structures.dim_filter: flat_array<uint32_t>(86136, UINT32_MAX) mapping qualifying adsh code -> sub rowid for fy=2022 only
data_structures.fact_join: compact_hash_map<uint64_t,double>(pre_sized=131072) keyed by packed ((uint64_t)adsh << 32) | tag; thread-local in pass 1, merged read-only for pass 2
data_structures.topk: thread_local min_heap<100> on (value DESC, name_code ASC, tag_code ASC), then merge to global top 100

parallelism.morsel: scan the pure-rowid postings slice in contiguous rowid ranges
parallelism.pass1: parallel rowid-range scan with thread-local max maps; merge maps after scan
parallelism.pass2: parallel rowid-range scan with shared read-only max map and thread-local top-k heaps

indexes.purpose: direct_array domain sizing / fallback adsh->rowid lookup

output.decode: carry name and tag as codes through both passes and the top-k merge; decode only final 100 rows
